segments.original_text: いやー!うーわ!今の上手かったけどね!

segments.text: The tree cancel works fine, but...
segments.original_text: 木を相殺するところまではOKなんですが

segments.text: To avoid that follow-up with horizontal drift...
segments.original_text: その後の追撃をかわすために横慣性

segments.text: There wasn't enough distance to grab the ledge
segments.original_text: 崖に捕まるまでの移動距離は足りませんでしたね

segments.text: It doesn't open up sideways at all
segments.original_text: 横にはね、全然開かないですからね
この突き上げアッパーカットは
さあこれですこれ!ハニワ諸共なんですよ

segments.text: You want to recover safely with this
segments.original_text: これがね、ハニワと一緒に安全に上がりたい
えー、村人側に対してかなり
刺さってきますからね

segments.text: And right now, against Fighting Mii and stuff...
segments.original_text: で、今ね、こうやって対格闘Miiだったりとか

segments.text: I'm going over the Villager matchup, but...
segments.original_text: 対村人の情報を言ってるんですけども

segments.text: The reason I'm saying this so boldly is...
segments.original_text: なぜこんな堂々と言ってるかというと

segments.text: Both players already know about it
segments.original_text: 両選手が折り込み済みで戦っているからですね
上スマッシュ!撃墜だー!

full_text: Oh! Nice positioning! Yeah! Whoa! That was clean! The tree cancel works fine, but... To avoid that follow-up with horizontal drift... There wasn't enough distance to grab the ledge. It doesn't open up sideways at all. This upward strike here... Alright, this is it! You want to recover safely with this. Against Villager especially... It really lands. And right now, against Fighting Mii and stuff... I'm going over the Villager matchup, but... The reason I'm saying this so boldly is... Both players already know about it. Up smash! That's the KO!
